title: conyza spicata
intro: Conyza spicata, also known as horse mint or fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that grows as a perennial or annual herb. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza spicata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Conyza spicata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
